particulars.description: Land at frinkley farm, hougham, lincolnshire t/no (part) LL76861.
Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

classification.description: Deed of charge over credit balances

particulars.description: The charge creates a fixed charge over all the deposit(s) referred to in the schedule to the form MGO1 (including all or any part of the money payable pursuant to such deposit(s) & the debts represented thereby) together with all interest from time to time accruing thereon. It also creates an assignment by the chargor for the purposes of & to give effect to the security over the right of the chargor to require repayment of such deposit(s) & interest thereon barclays bank PLC re a & b white (frinkley) limited active saver account, account number 03195120.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: Part welhill farm and frinkley farm parish of hougham, county of lincoln shire. 399.252 ares (approx).
